---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement to an existing one
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: v-senthil
---

## Problem

What is the user or operator trying to do today that is hard, tedious, or impossible?

## Proposal

The change you'd like to see. UI sketches, sample API calls, or a short scenario walkthrough all help.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approach you thought about and why the proposal is better.

## Additional context

Related Meta docs, existing endpoints in the Postman collection, or prior discussions.
